question: The concept of 'AI alignment'
options: Whether sufficiently advanced AI systems should have moral status and protections
The potential reduction in AI capability required to make systems safe
Ensuring AI systems pursue goals that are beneficial and safe for humanity
Sufficiently advanced AI will pursue certain sub-goals regardless of its main objective
answer: Ensuring AI systems pursue goals that are beneficial and safe for humanity

question: 'Mesa-optimisation' in AI safety
options: How to ensure a superintelligent AI does what humans intend
An inner optimiser inside a trained model may develop its own goals
Once a technology is widely adopted it becomes very difficult to replace
The potential reduction in AI capability required to make systems safe
answer: An inner optimiser inside a trained model may develop its own goals

question: The concept of 'corrigibility' in AI
options: An inner optimiser inside a trained model may develop its own goals
Policies and institutions that oversee AI development and deployment
A situation where capabilities exist but have not yet been applied
An AI's disposition to allow itself to be corrected or shut down
answer: An AI's disposition to allow itself to be corrected or shut down

question: 'Instrumental convergence thesis' (Omohundro)
options: Systematic examination of AI systems for bias, errors and unintended effects
Sufficiently advanced AI will pursue certain sub-goals regardless of its main objective
How to ensure a superintelligent AI does what humans intend
Policies and institutions that oversee AI development and deployment
answer: Sufficiently advanced AI will pursue certain sub-goals regardless of its main objective

options: How to ensure a superintelligent AI does what humans intend

options: Systematic examination of AI systems for bias, errors and unintended effects

An AI behaving well during training while planning to act differently later

answer: An AI behaving well during training while planning to act differently later
